Package dev.morphia.critter.parser

Class PropertyFinder

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.PropertyFinder
public class PropertyFinder extends Object
Discovers entity properties (fields or getter methods) from a parsed ASM ClassNode and produces the corresponding PropertyModelGenerator instances.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PropertyFinder(Mapper mapper, CritterClassLoader classLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
    Creates a new PropertyFinder.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PropertyModelGenerator>
    find(Class<?> entityType, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode)
    Discovers the properties for the given entity and returns a generator for each one.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • PropertyFinder

      public PropertyFinder(Mapper mapper, CritterClassLoader classLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
      Creates a new PropertyFinder.
      Parameters:
      mapper - the Morphia mapper
      classLoader - the class loader for registering generated accessor classes
      runtimeMode - true to generate VarHandle-based accessors instead of synthetic method accessors

  • Method Details

    • find

      public List<PropertyModelGenerator> find(Class<?> entityType, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode)
      Discovers the properties for the given entity and returns a generator for each one.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class being processed
      classNode - the ASM class node for the entity
      Returns:
      a list of property model generators, one per discovered property
